name: Chocolate Chip Blond Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
2. Add the chopped nuts and mix well. Set aside.
3. Melt the butter in a saucepan; remove from heat. If using margarine, add 2 tablespoons of hot water.
4. Add the brown sugar and beat well.
5. Let cool. Add the eggs and vanilla, blending well.
6. Gradually add the flour mixture, a small amount at a time, mixing well after each addition.
7. Fold in the chocolate chips.
8. Spread the batter in a greased 9x12-inch baking pan.
9. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 20 to 25 minutes. Do not overbake.
10. Cool in the pan and cut into squares.
Preparation time: 15 minutes
Baking time: 20 to 25 minutes
